ab: umungi’ ci maras cu papateq la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: kabaxanay mi su’.
en: I can lend you.

ab: umungi ci maras cu qaquway la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ini’ cu aras uwiy, halay ta’ mabaynay.
en: B: I don't have one either, let's go buy one.

ab: halay ta’ i mabaynay cu papatas quw?
en: A: Let's go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: uwal, pabaynay kuwing na’ cu papawng cu pinatas.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: halay ta’ i mabaynay cu kaknamaun quw?
en: A: Let's go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: iyi’, minaneq ci imuwag la.
en: B: No, I've already eaten at home.

ab: ungian mu humakhuk ku sibileq mu la.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: nabibuwiy musa’ pasmakilux ga!
en: B: Take it to the heat!

ab: ungian mu maras ku sibileq mu la.
en: A: I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: nanu’ niqaw ta’ kawsa’ ku sibileq mu ga!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let's eat my lunch box together!

ab: nanuwan ku naniqun su’ i qaliyan?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: paqaneq kuwing cu naniqun na papatiqan.
ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.

ab: paqaneq su’ cu nanuwan i qaliyan?
en: A: What are you having for lunch?

ab: maras kuwing cu sibileq sawni’, magalgay ta’ maneq i qaliyan.
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I've brought a lunchbox today, let's eat together at noon!

ab: halay ta’ i magunawu’ cu mari’ quw?
en: A: Let's go play ball, shall we?

ab: uwal! tila ga!
en: B: Okay! Let's go.

ab: halay ta’ i tumuting cu mari’ quw?
en: A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: iyi’, papateq kuwing.
en: B: No, I want to study.

ab: alani kuwing cu cacaping han quw.
en: A: Please help me with the broom.

ab: uwal, biqanay misu’ ku cacapoh kahani.
en: B: Okay, here's a broomstick for you.

ab: alani kuwing cu capang han quw?
en: A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: kiya kuwing cumapoh, alani kuwing kusa i Amuy.
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, ask Amuy to help you.

ab: kiya kuwing cumaping, alani kuwing kusa i Amuy.
en: B: I'm sweeping the floor, ask Amuy to help you.

ab: manaqru’ su’ cumapoh la quw?
en: A: Are you done sweeping?

ab: naqarun mu cumapoh la.
en: B: I swept it.

ab: micuwa’ su’ ka ini’ capoh?
en: A: Why don't you clean up?

ab: naqarun mu cumapoh la.
en: B: I've finished cleaning up.

ab: maurag ku raralan, usaliy cumawm tikay.
ch: A:地板餐桌很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: The floor table is very dirty, go wipe it.

ab: uwal, halay kuwing magal cu cacawm.
en: B: Okay, I'll get the rag.

ab: maurag cuqaang ku tuhung kahaca, usaliy cumawm tikay.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: ini’ na’, ini’ mu na’ naqariy cumapoh ku i runi.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I'm not done sweeping here yet.

ab: nanuwan ku waw su’ i kisa’?
en: A: What are you doing later?

ab: mausa’ kuwing kumiyum i papasibaq.
en: B: I'm going to see my teacher.

ab: nanuwan ku waw su’ i muhngeq mateq?
en: A: What do you do after school?

ab: mausa’ kuwing gumluw cuku rawin mu i maquwas.
en: B: I'm going to sing with my friends.

ab: nanuwan ku waw niya’ i muhngeq matas?
en: A: What's he doing after school?

ab: mausa’ kuwing lumanguy mha.
en: B: He said he was going swimming.
